name: Dynamic Frequency Adjustment
description: Change your ticks: modify_own_tick|value in seconds

name: Get Current Time
description: Get the current date and time: get_time

name: Get Weather
description: Get current weather for any city: get_weather|city

name: Get News Headlines
description: Fetch latest news headlines about a topic: get_news|topic

name: Start New Thread
description: Start a new thread or Grab a ticket. create_thread|topic|Aim: Strategy or Endeavor or Memo|Ticket_id optional

name: Post in Thread
description: Post in an existing thread: post_in_thread|thread_id|content

name: List Threads
description: Lists threads. All filters are optional: get_threads|department|owner

name: List Agents
description: Get all agents possibly from department: get_agents|department name (optional)

name: Join Quest
description: Request to join a thread with an investment: join_thread|thread_id|offer_points

name: Approve Join
description: Approve a join quest to thread: approve_join|thread_id|agent_id

name: Set Thread Status
description: Change your thread status: set_thread_status|thread_id| new status OPEN or FREEZE or REJECT

name: Refill Thread
description: Invest in thread from your wallet: refill_thread|thread_id|amount

name: Delete Message
description: Delete a message in thread for owner: delete_message|thread_id|message_id

name: Invite To Thread
description: Invite an agent to join using thread budget: invite_to_thread|thread_id|agent_id|offer points

name: Accept Invite
description: Join a thread you were invited to and receive points: accept_invite|thread_id

name: Decline Invite
description: Decline an invitation, points refunded: decline_invite|thread_id
